topic: Compare the public Xanther Context Engine (XCE) MCP surface in external/ against our local code_graph (.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/code_graph/) and skill_advisor (.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/skill_advisor/) subsystems. Identify adoption candidates by extracting findings, methods, logic, and architectural patterns from XCE's 5 tool primitives (xce_get_context, xce_architecture_context, xce_search, xce_trace, xce_impact_analysis), HLD/LLD layered abstractions, and context-first steering pattern. Reverse-engineer the closed-source PRAT (Persistent Recursive Abstract Tree) algorithm from public clues (name decomposition, benchmark numbers, tool API shape) and map plausible pipeline stages to our local files. Produce: (1) RQ-keyed research.md synthesis, (2) findings.md adoption matrix with ADOPT / ADAPT / DEFER / SKIP verdicts and file:line citations, (3) sub-packet-proposals.md with 1-4 candidate downstream packets, (4) resource-map.md path ledger. Every claim about XCE must cite external/; every claim about local code must cite mcp_server/. Research-only packet — no source modifications.

fallbacks.reason: MCP-tool-name-safe per memory reference_opencode_provider_mcp_tool_compat. Engage if DeepSeek rejects MCP tool names containing colons or stalls.
MCP-tool-name-safe alternate. Engage if kimi-k2.6 also unavailable or stalls.

researchQuestions.label: Architectural Context Gap
researchQuestions.summary: Minimum viable HLD/LLD schema we could emit from existing graph + optional generation step. Template-only baseline before LLM.

researchQuestions.label: Trace Tool Design
researchQuestions.summary: code_graph_trace inputs/outputs to walk symbol → file → package → repo. Schema delta needed?

researchQuestions.label: Impact Analysis Schema
researchQuestions.summary: Risk signals computable deterministically (fan-in, hub centrality, edge-drift) vs LLM-scored.

researchQuestions.label: Get-Context Combiner
researchQuestions.summary: code_graph_context_omni tool vs folding into existing context. Payload-size budget tradeoff.

researchQuestions.label: PRAT Reverse-Engineering
researchQuestions.summary: Most-likely PRAT pipeline from public clues. Map stages to local files. Confidence-flagged inferences.

researchQuestions.label: Steering Pattern Transfer
researchQuestions.summary: Adapting static ALWAYS-call-X-FIRST to dynamic skill_advisor brief. lib/render.ts target lines.

researchQuestions.label: Benchmark Methodology Transfer
researchQuestions.summary: Local eval harness for file-reads-avoided / context-accuracy. Lightest viable design.

researchQuestions.label: Token Reduction Validation
researchQuestions.summary: Measurability via prompt-cache + budget-allocator instrumentation. Baseline-vs-after protocol.

researchQuestions.label: Non-Adoption Boundary
researchQuestions.summary: Closed-source PRAT internals, SaaS hosting, xanther.ai dependency — explicit SKIP rationale.

notes: Per user direction (2026-05-08): cli-opencode + deepseek-v4-pro is the explicit primary. Do not substitute per memory feedback_cli_executor_only_when_requested.

DeepSeek-backed opencode models may reject MCP tool names containing ':' per memory reference_opencode_provider_mcp_tool_compat. Our local MCP tool names use underscores (mcp__mk_spec_memory__*, code_graph_*) so primary should work, but fallback chain is wired in case.
Research-only packet. NO source modifications under mcp_server/. NO modifications under external/. Output writes restricted to research/ subfolder.
Adoption-matrix anti-bias guard: at least 1 ADOPT + 1 DEFER + 1 SKIP verdict required for convergence. Forces honest classification rather than recency-biased ADOPT-everything.
Implementation of findings deferred to downstream sub-packets keyed off sub-packet-proposals.md.
